## Topics

### Post-Kickoff Debrief Process

  - [Introduce 5-minute post-call debrief to capture top insights](https://fathom.video/share/uzLphizGENVWAcHcGLNW9mzb_HYPrCKo?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Share findings in internal channels immediately after calls](https://fathom.video/share/uzLphizGENVWAcHcGLNW9mzb_HYPrCKo?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Allows cross-checking of important points between team members](https://fathom.video/share/uzLphizGENVWAcHcGLNW9mzb_HYPrCKo?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)
  - [Accelerates info dissemination vs. waiting for strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/uzLphizGENVWAcHcGLNW9mzb_HYPrCKo?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)

### Client Similarity Benefits

  - [Recent kickoffs: two similar AI companies (incl. Covill)](https://fathom.video/share/uzLphizGENVWAcHcGLNW9mzb_HYPrCKo?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [Similarity eased research process and mental context-switching](https://fathom.video/share/uzLphizGENVWAcHcGLNW9mzb_HYPrCKo?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Suggestion: Group similar companies for kickoffs when scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/uzLphizGENVWAcHcGLNW9mzb_HYPrCKo?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)

  - [Recognizes importance of kickoff context for entire team](https://fathom.video/share/uzLphizGENVWAcHcGLNW9mzb_HYPrCKo?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
